extraction.one_line_summary: LAPORTE Christophe bridged to a late breakaway at 1.4km, refused to work, then outsprint the cooperating riders for France's first stage win in 38 stages.
tactical_patterns: LAPORTE bridged at 1.4km without pulling through, exploiting LUTSENKO/PHILIPSEN/WRIGHT cooperation to steal victory via selective non-work.
Quick-Step exhausted chasing with CATTANEO last to quit, proving domestiques' depth limitations in crosswind-threatened flat stages.
POGACAR attacked 35km out despite 3:26 deficit showing continued aggression signals even when mathematically eliminated from GC.

rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: executed perfect late-bridge non-cooperation tactic, saving energy while others worked, revealing elite tactical judgment in chaotic finales
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: attacking 35km out when down 3:26 shows either poor race calculation or team directive to maintain aggressive image
rider_signals.CATTANEO Mattia: negative: Quick-Step's last domestique abandoned chase proving team lacked depth to control crosswind-threatened sprint stage
